description: You are a film composer setting up an Ardour session for a short film called 'The Midnight Garden'. Configure the session's tempo map, time signatures, and markers in the session file at /home/ga/Audio/sessions/MyProject/MyProject.ardour according to the director's cue sheet located at /home/ga/Audio/cue_sheets/midnight_garden_cue_sheet.txt. The session must have an initial tempo of 72 BPM at bar 1, with tempo changes at bar 9 (152 BPM), bar 21 (108 BPM), and bar 33 (132 BPM). Set the time signature to 3/4 at bar 21 and 4/4 at bar 33. Include location markers named 'Prologue' (bar 1), 'Chase' (bar 9), 'Waltz' (bar 21), and 'Finale' (bar 33). Rename the 'Audio 1' track to 'Score Sketch' and save the session.
